assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, a valid email address, and an accepted payment card for identity verification.
The developer's country supports self-service Free Trial signup rather than an Oracle Sales-only path.
No OCI tenancy, Home Region, compartment, or first resource exists yet.

developer_goal: Create an OCI Free Trial tenancy and reach the earliest meaningful first-resource success.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved: Create Your First Resources lists coequal Compute, Object Storage, Networking, Database, Block Volume, and Load Balancer tutorials.
first_success.observable_signal: A candidate terminal is an authenticated shell on the first Linux instance, but peer first-resource tutorials exist.

route_selection.surface: Oracle Cloud Free Trial signup and OCI Console tutorials
route_selection.rule: Free Trial signup is documented, but first-resource tutorials remain coequal; do not invent a winner.

candidates.name: Launch your first Linux instance
candidates.reason: Complete console path to an instance shell, listed as one Compute tutorial among several first-resource categories.

candidates.name: Launch your first Windows instance
candidates.reason: Peer Compute tutorial with a different guest OS and connection path.

candidates.name: Object Storage, Networking, Database, Block Volume, or Load Balancer first tutorials
candidates.reason: Official Create Your First Resources page presents these as parallel learning paths after Free Trial signup.

candidates.name: Get Started with the CLI
candidates.reason: Interface-specific walkthrough with separate CLI setup; not the only general route.

required_path.action: Open Oracle Cloud Free Trial signup, enter country, name, email, and CAPTCHA, then choose Verify my email.
required_path.observable_result: Oracle sends a verification email with a signup link valid for 30 minutes.

required_path.action: Open the verification email and follow the link to continue signup.
required_path.observable_result: The signup flow returns to account information entry.

required_path.action: Set password, cloud account name, Home Region, address and phone details, accept Terms of Use, and continue.
Add a credit card payment verification method, accept terms, and start the free trial.
required_path.observable_result: Oracle provisions the Free Trial tenancy and redirects to the OCI Console.

required_path.action: Choose one first-resource tutorial category and complete that resource path.
required_path.observable_result: One bounded OCI first-resource terminal is fixed.

prerequisites.description: Country eligibility for self-service Free Trial signup; some countries must contact Oracle Sales instead.

external_gates.description: Accepted payment card for identity verification with a possible temporary hold.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email delivery of the 30-minute verification link.
Tenancy and service provisioning after Start my free trial before Console use.

platform_outcomes.description: Oracle creates the Free Trial tenancy and redirects to the OCI Console after payment verification.
A welcome Get Started email arrives with account information.

excluded.reason: Official signup instructions mark company name optional.

excluded.item: Choosing Linux instance as the universal OCI first success without human judgment
excluded.reason: Create Your First Resources lists multiple coequal categories and tutorials.

sources.title: Sign Up for the Free Oracle Cloud Promotion
evidence_supported: Payment verification and Start my free trial

uncertainties.question: Which first-resource tutorial is the selected OCI shortest path after Free Trial signup?
uncertainties.impact: Compute, networking, storage, and database tutorials produce different required actions and terminals.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one first-resource goal, then audit that tutorial from a provisioned Free Trial tenancy.

uncertainties.question: Do live signup.oraclecloud.com screens match the documented optional company field and country-specific Terms checkboxes?
uncertainties.impact: Exact field counts for a verified audit need public UI confirmation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of the current Free Trial signup wizard.
